title: Adobe sued for trademark infringement over 'Foundry' AI tool
description: British visual-effects software company The Foundry Visionmongers has sued Adobe ​in California federal court, arguing Adobe's Firefly Foundry suite ‌of generative artificial intelligence tools violates its trademark rights in the "Foundry" name.

title: AI chatbots help plot attacks - study

title: Dreame Debuts AURORA Smartphones at AWE 2026 With Modular Camera System and Luxury Lineup
description: Dreame AURORA smartphones debuted at AWE 2026 with a dual strategy, including 29 AURORA LUX Series models (blending tech and luxury) and the world's first modular imaging flagship NEX LS1, targeting the global premium market.Upholding 'Technology First', Dreame will invest over RMB 10 billion in R&D (imaging, system, display) over three years, revealed its AURORA AIOS 1.0 (to launch H2 2026) and plans to grow its team to 5,000 by 2027 with over 70% R&D personnel.SHANGHAI, March 12, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Dreame Technology made a strong push into the global premium smartphone market by showcasing 29 AURORA smartphones at the Appliance & Electronics World Expo 2026 (AWE 2026), held from March 12 to March 15 in Shanghai. The diverse lineup includes a full range of devices from its AURORA LUX Series and high-end imaging flagship models, highlighting the company's dual-product strategy that focuses on combining elegant luxury design with industry-leading cutting-edge technology. To firmly support this global expansion, Dreame officially announced plans to invest more than RMB 10 billion (approximately $1.38 billion) in research and development over the next three years, with a clear and unwavering focus on advanced imaging technologies, intelligent artificial intelligence systems, and high-performance display solutions.**media[971131]**
content:
Dreame AURORA smartphones debuted at AWE 2026 with a dual strategy, including 29 AURORA LUX Series models (blending tech and luxury) and the world's first modular imaging flagship NEX LS1, targeting the global premium market.
